title: Spicy Ancho Chicken Casserole
description: A flavorful and spicy casserole dish filled with chicken, ancho chillies, and a hint of sweetness. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the ancho chillies, casserole, and spice blend to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish. Drizzle with spicy jelly.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the casserole is heated through.
Sprinkle with glassy salt and serve hot.
